# SPRINT — YYYY-MM-DD
# Generated by main_morning_brief.py — DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY (re-generate instead)
# Template version: 2.0 (includes CP snapshot + EOD report templates)

---

## TODAY'S GOAL

[One-line goal for today — comes from week plan]

**Primary week goal:** [from WEEK_*.md header]
**Phase focus:** [Phase X — what we're pushing today]

---

## ⚠️ OPERATOR ACTIONS PENDING (check before starting)

- [ ] [Operator action from §5 STATE_CURRENT.md — if none, delete this section]

---

## TODAY'S TZs (LOCKED SCOPE)

| # | TZ_ID | Description | Est. |
|---|-------|-------------|------|
| 1 | TZ-XXXX | … | 2h |
| 2 | TZ-YYYY | … | 1.5h |

**DO NOT add TZs not listed above without operator approval.**

---

## HARD DELIVERABLES

- [ ] D1: [concrete artifact — file path, test count, metric value]
- [ ] D2: [metric — "Brier ≤0.22", "45 tests green", commit hash]

---

## CHECKPOINT TRIGGERS

- **CP1:** After D1 complete OR after 2h (whichever first) → send CP snapshot to operator for MAIN
- **CP2:** After D2 complete OR end of scope → send CP snapshot to operator for MAIN

---

## ANTI-DRIFT REMINDERS

- Every task must be in TODAY'S TZs above — nothing else
- If a deliverable takes >2x estimate → TIME DRIFT, flag in CP snapshot
- At TZ end: verify ALL hard deliverables before marking DONE

---

## CP SNAPSHOT TEMPLATE (use at each CP trigger)

```
=== CP SNAPSHOT — YYYY-MM-DD CP[N] ===
Time: HH:MM
TZ in progress: [TZ-ID]
Status: IN_PROGRESS / BLOCKED / DONE
Deliverables:
  D1: ✅ done / ❌ missing / 🔄 in progress — [note]
  D2: [same]
Time spent: [Xh] of est [Yh]
Scope additions since brief: [none / describe exactly what was added and why]
Next: [what I'm doing next]
Blocker: [none / describe]
=== END SNAPSHOT ===
```

---

## EOD REPORT TEMPLATE (use at end of day)

```
=== EOD REPORT — YYYY-MM-DD ===
Day goal achieved: YES / PARTIAL / NO

DELIVERABLES:
  D1: ✅ done — [artifact path or metric]
  D2: ❌ not done — [reason]

SCOPE DELTA:
  Added (drift+): [none / list with justification]
  Skipped (drift-): [none / list with reason]

TIME ACTUAL: [Xh] vs estimate [Yh]

COMMITS: [git log --oneline -3 output]

BLOCKERS FOR TOMORROW: [none / describe]

OPEN QUESTIONS FOR OPERATOR: [none / describe]
=== END EOD REPORT ===
```

---

## END OF DAY — OPERATOR STEPS

```powershell
cd c:\bot7
python scripts/main_evening_validate.py --sprint docs/SPRINTS/SPRINT_YYYY-MM-DD.md --no-verify
```

Then paste EOD report + script output into MAIN chat. See MAIN_PROJECT_SETUP_GUIDE for exact format.

Then update docs/STATE/STATE_CURRENT.md §2, §4, §6.
